_meta.purpose: Resolvable-curie reference for check_fibo_curie_resolvability in validate.py. Every `fibo-*:Class` / `cmns-*:Class` class curie AND every `fibo-*:objectProperty` / `cmns-*:objectProperty` object-property curie asserted anywhere under model/ must appear here (classes under `classes`, object properties under `object_properties`), so a fabricated FIBO citation — class or property — fails the validator. The validator stays deterministic and offline: it checks against THIS list, never the network.
_meta.source: FIBO: https://github.com/edmcouncil/fibo (master), published at https://spec.edmcouncil.org/fibo/ontology/ . OMG Commons: https://www.omg.org/spec/Commons/ .
_meta.verification_method: Each class name below was confirmed as an owl:Class declaration in the named module's RDF, fetched from the edmcouncil/fibo master branch (or the OMG Commons published RDF for cmns-* prefixes). Seeded from the OIM-213 repo-wide sweep: every curie then asserted under model/ was resolved KEEP / REMAP / DE-SPECIFY against the live source; the KEEP set (plus the classes named adjacent to a verified curie in model/fibo-alignment.md) is this list.
_meta.object_properties_verification_method: For the F2 relation-verb FIBO alignment (model/fibo-alignment.md `## Relation-verb alignment`), each object property below was confirmed as an owl:ObjectProperty declaration in the named module's RDF, fetched from the edmcouncil/fibo master branch. Modules fetched and confirmed: FND/Relations/Relations (isIssuedBy, isHeldBy, isGeneratedBy — all present, no domain/range restriction, generic relation super-properties); FBC/FinancialInstruments/FinancialInstruments (hasUnderlier, range Underlier); SEC/Funds/Funds (isSubFundOf, domain/range PooledFund); FND/Agreements/Contracts (hasCounterparty, domain Contract, range Counterparty); BE/OwnershipAndControl/CorporateControl (isSubsidiaryOf domain Subsidiary range ControllingAffiliate; isAffiliateOf domain/range Affiliate). Only the properties actually cited by the alignment are listed (the reference asserts verification of what is cited, not an inventory of every property in each module). A relationship with no verifiable FIBO object property is listed openim-only in the alignment, never given an invented curie.
_meta.maintenance: To cite a NEW FIBO or Commons class OR object property in model/: (1) resolve it against the live published ontology first (fetch the module RDF from edmcouncil/fibo master, or the ontology browser at spec.edmcouncil.org, and confirm the owl:Class / owl:ObjectProperty declaration exists); (2) add the class name under `classes`, or the property local-name under `object_properties`, for its prefix here (add the prefix block, with its namespace and module path, if the prefix is new); (3) re-run the validator. Never add a name you have not resolved against the live source — this file asserts verification, not intention. If FIBO removes or relocates a name already listed here, the citation in model/ is what must change (re-verify, then update both).
_meta.known_non_checked_forms: Prefix-only module mentions (e.g. `fibo-ind-ir-ir` with no :Class) and deliberately non-specific forms (e.g. `fibo-cae-...:CorporateAction`) assert a module or a concept area, not a resolvable curie, and are not checked. Class curies are UpperCamelCase local names; object-property curies are lowerCamelCase local names — the two are gated against `classes` and `object_properties` respectively.
